text:
[
  {
    "thinking": "The user hovers the cursor over the 'AI Interview' card in the 'Short tasks & surveys' section. The cursor remains still for several hundred milliseconds before moving on.",
    "type": "hover",
    "time_start_ms": 6100,
    "time_end_ms": 6500,
    "description": "Hover over the 'AI Interview' task card",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "AI Interview",
    "frame_description": "The user is on the Explore page, browsing available tasks. The cursor is positioned over the first task card."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user moves the cursor to the 'Video Call' card in the 'Sessions to schedule' section and pauses briefly.",
    "type": "hover",
    "time_start_ms": 8350,
    "time_end_ms": 8800,
    "description": "Hover over the 'Video Call' session card",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "Video Call",
    "frame_description": "The user continues browsing the Explore page, moving the cursor down to the sessions section."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user clicks on the filter icon located in the top right corner of the screen to open the filtering options.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 10600,
    "time_end_ms": 10700,
    "description": "Click on the filter icon",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "The user moves the cursor to the top right and clicks the filter icon."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "After clicking the filter icon, a modal titled 'Filter Opportunities' slides up from the bottom of the screen.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 11750,
    "time_end_ms": 12000,
    "description": "The 'Filter Opportunities' modal appears",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "A modal overlay appears on top of the Explore page, presenting various filter categories like Task Type, Duration, and Pay Rate."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user selects the 'Under 10 min' option in the 'DURATION' section of the filter modal.",
    "type": "select",
    "time_start_ms": 30650,
    "time_end_ms": 30750,
    "description": "Select 'Under 10 min' duration filter",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "Under 10 min",
    "frame_description": "The user clicks on the 'Under 10 min' chip, which changes its visual state to indicate selection."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user then selects the '10-30 min' option, which deselects the previous choice as it's likely a single-select field for duration.",
    "type": "select",
    "time_start_ms": 31250,
    "time_end_ms": 31350,
    "description": "Select '10-30 min' duration filter",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "10-30 min",
    "frame_description": "The user clicks on the '10-30 min' chip; the 'Under 10 min' chip is deselected."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user interacts with the 'PAY RATE' range slider, moving both the left and right handles to adjust the price range.",
    "type": "drag",
    "time_start_ms": 36300,
    "time_end_ms": 44450,
    "description": "Adjust the Pay Rate range slider",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "PAY RATE",
    "frame_description": "The user drags the handles on the horizontal slider to set a specific pay range."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user selects the 'Either' option in the 'DEVICE' section of the filter modal.",
    "type": "select",
    "time_start_ms": 45900,
    "time_end_ms": 46000,
    "description": "Select 'Either' device filter",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "Either",
    "frame_description": "The user clicks the radio button for 'Either' in the Device section."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Upon selecting a device option, the modal content expands or scrolls to reveal an 'ADVANCED OPTIONS' section at the bottom.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 46100,
    "time_end_ms": 46300,
    "description": "Advanced options section becomes visible",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The layout of the modal shifts, showing a new section for advanced filtering."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user returns to the 'PAY RATE' slider and makes further adjustments to the range by dragging the handles.",
    "type": "drag",
    "time_start_ms": 51150,
    "time_end_ms": 57450,
    "description": "Further adjust the Pay Rate range slider",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "PAY RATE",
    "frame_description": "The user is fine-tuning the pay range by moving the slider handles back and forth."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user makes one final adjustment to the 'PAY RATE' slider.",
    "type": "drag",
    "time_start_ms": 76400,
    "time_end_ms": 77100,
    "description": "Final adjustment to the Pay Rate range slider",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "PAY RATE",
    "frame_description": "A quick drag on the pay rate slider handle."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user switches the duration filter back to 'Under 10 min'.",
    "type": "select",
    "time_start_ms": 81250,
    "time_end_ms": 81350,
    "description": "Select 'Under 10 min' duration filter again",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "Under 10 min",
    "frame_description": "The user clicks the 'Under 10 min' chip, deselecting '10-30 min'."
  }
]
